title: All the Way
original_title: The Night We Called It a Day
overview: Based on the true events surrounding Frank Sinatra's tour of Australia. When Sinatra calls a local reporter a "two-bit hooker", every union in the country black-bans the star until he issues an apology.

trailers.title: 2003 television promo for "The Night We Called It A Day". Australian Film. Frank Sinatra
